subject: Warrior of Light from Final Fantasy / Dissidia — a heavily armored knight in blue-gold plate with horned helmet and shield
suspected_ip: Warrior of Light (Final Fantasy I / Dissidia Final Fantasy)
description: A commanding armored figure stands in a poised warrior stance, wearing elaborate full blue-and-gold plate armor with large swept horn-like protrusions on the helmet. The armor is richly detailed with overlapping plates, gold trim, and a blue gemstone or crest at the chest. The left arm bears a large shield. The overall presentation is heroic and formal. A ghosted, soft white version of the figure occupies the background — a doubled-image motif common in FFTCG Hero cards. The palette is a blue and gold dominant scheme with white atmospheric tones. The card frame identifies this as Warrior of Light from Dissidia Final Fantasy, character design by Tetsuya Nomura, FF1 franchise origin (DFF·I).
foreground: armored knight in blue-gold plate with horned helmet and shield
background: ghosted soft white figure silhouette, pale atmospheric tones
emotion: stoic, noble — upright stance conveys duty and resolve
